data.body:
Goal:
Teach Knots about a first-class execution_plan knot type with a builtin execution_plan_sdlc workflow so plans are no longer modeled as generic work knots or ad hoc payloads.

Verification:
1. In the Knots worktree, run targeted tests for knot-type parsing/validation, builtin workflow installation, repo defaults, and kno new/show paths for execution_plan.
2. Run a manual smoke check like kno new --type execution_plan in a test repo and confirm the created knot reports the execution_plan_sdlc workflow and expected default profile.

Constraints:
- Bundle both profiles: autopilot defaulting to agent review and semiauto defaulting to human review.
- Use note for design output and approval for review output.
- Keep execution-plan authoring lifecycle in the workflow state machine and reserve runtime plan status for typed payload data.
data.title: Add execution_plan type and workflow to Knots
